executive_summary: The website https://plausible.io/ has a perfect performance score of 100/100, with no major issues found. However, there are some minor suggestions for improvement, such as implementing efficient cache lifetimes.

key_findings.title: Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) is within budget
key_findings.description: The page's LCP is 1.5s on mobile and 0.4s on desktop, which is within the recommended budget of 2.5s.
key_findings.recommendation: No action needed; the page's LCP is already within the recommended budget.

key_findings.title: Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) is within budget
key_findings.description: The page's CLS is 0 on both mobile and desktop, which is within the recommended budget of 0.1.
key_findings.recommendation: No action needed; the page's CLS is already within the recommended budget.

key_findings.title: Estimated savings from efficient cache lifetimes
key_findings.description: The page can potentially save 14 KiB by using efficient cache lifetimes.
key_findings.recommendation: Consider implementing efficient cache lifetimes to reduce the page's load time.
